title: Steam & Gears
description: Industrial modpack based on the Сreate mod. Adds space travel and simple farming. There are also a bunch of decoration mods
body:
**Introduction:**
Embark on an exciting journey through the world of mechanisms and amazing space adventures

**Include:**
This modpack contains the Create mod, which adds mechanisms, gears, pipes and much more to the game. Create complex industrial systems, automate processes and enjoy kinetic energy!
There are also many add-ons for Create, expand the capabilities of the Create mod with various add-ons that add new mechanisms, tools and recipes.
The Ad Astra mod will allow you to conquer the vastness of space, build spaceships and explore new worlds!
Set up a cozy hut with the help of decoration mods, decorate your home with new interior items and create an atmosphere in which you will enjoy playing.

**For:**
The modpack contains many mods that are suitable for both fans of industrial buildings and those who just want to relax and do farming and decorating.
